Risen Energy recognized for climate action in 2024 Sustainability Practices Repository.
news.summary: In Ningbo, China on December 20, 2024, Risen Energy Co., Ltd, a leading company in the renewable energy industry, was recognized for its dedication to climate action. It was included in the 2024 Repository of Outstanding Sustainability Practices for Listed Companies. This achievement highlights Risen Energy's commitment to sustainable practices.

Cryptocurrencies retreat as Bitcoin drops to $97,251.29 (-3.30%), Ethereum to $3,425.34 (-6.08%), Dogecoin to $0.3159 (-12.28%). Over $1 billion liquidated, with Bitcoin at risk of losing $96K support.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market saw further decline following the Federal Reserve's hawkish statements. Bitcoin dropped by 3.30% to $97,251.29, after reaching $102,000 earlier in the day. Ethereum fell by 6.08% to $3,425.34, and Dogecoin saw a 12.28% decrease to $0.3159. Over $1 billion was liquidated from the market in the last 24 hours, with $860 million in long liquidations. Bitcoin's Open Interest also decreased by 4.24%. Despite the drop, the percentage of Binance traders taking long positions for Bitcoin rose sharply to 61%.

news.headline: Australian tech company AZZO secures investment from Angeleno Group to expand globally. Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: In Adelaide, Australia on December 19, 2024, a prominent energy management software and services firm revealed that it has secured a growth capital investment from Angeleno Group, a renowned venture capital and growth equity firm specializing in clean energy and climate solutions. The investment marks a significant milestone for the Australian company and is expected to drive further development and expansion.

news.headline: Dogecoin and meme coins drop after Fed Chair Powell's statement on inflation, causing a surge in trading volume.
news.summary: The value of Dogecoin experienced a decline recently as the trading volume saw a significant increase. This drop occurred after Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell commented on Wednesday that the inflation forecasts had not met expectations. The event led to a surge in trading activity around Dogecoin.

Range Capital Acquisition Corp. priced its $100 million initial public offering of 10,000,000 units at $10 each. Trading starts Dec 20, 2024.
news.summary: A corporation named Range Capital Acquisition Corp. in Cold Spring Harbor, N.Y., revealed the pricing details of its initial public offering on December 19, 2024. The company offered 10,000,000 units for $10.00 per unit. These units are planned to start trading on December 20, 2024.

news.headline: TotalEnergies Marketing USA, Inc. partners with Terpel Panama to distribute engine oils in Panama.
news.summary: A significant agreement has been reached in Panama as TotalEnergies Marketing USA, Inc.'s Central America division and Terpel Panama have formed a national strategic alliance. The partnership aims to enhance the commercialization of energy products and services in the region. This alliance brings together two leading companies to expand their market presence. The partnership agreement was formalized in Panama City on December 19, 2024. This collaboration is poised to impact the energy sector significantly and capitalize on the strengths of both companies.

news.headline: Macau, the global gambling hub, is seeking stronger ties with China after 25 years as a Chinese territory.
news.summary: After 25 years of being under Chinese control since its transfer from Portuguese ownership, Macau's economic ties with mainland China are becoming increasingly intertwined.

Youxin Technology Ltd prices $10.35 million IPO, offering 2.3 million Class A ordinary shares at $4.50 each on NASDAQ: YAAS symbol known.
news.summary: In Guangzhou, China, on December 19, 2024, Youxin Technology Ltd, a leading SaaS and PaaS provider for retail businesses, disclosed details of its initial public offering (IPO). The Company priced the Offering at 2,300,000 Class A ordinary shares, valuing each share at US$4.50. These shares are set to be traded on The Nasdaq Capital Market starting December 20, 2024, using the ticker symbol “YAAS.”

news.headline: Osisko Development grants 80,000 deferred share units to director Stephen Quin amid new board appointment.
news.summary: On December 19, 2024, Osisko Development Corp. revealed that it had issued 80,000 deferred share units (DSUs) to Mr. Stephen Quin, an independent director. This allocation was a component of his nomination to the board of directors on December 5, 2024. Mr. Quin was appointed to Osisko Development's board of directors as part of this update. Osisko Development is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ODV and on the TSXV under the same ticker symbol.

Australia sees 6.2% year on year rise in credit to business and consumers
Bipartisan House AI task force released 253-page report on boosting AI development and mitigating risks.
news.summary: The House Artificial Intelligence Task Force, chaired by Rep. Jay Obernolte (R-Calif.), revealed a 253-page report on Tuesday outlining recommendations for Congress to promote AI development while mitigating potential risks. The report signifies the group's efforts since February and Obernolte noted it marks the "beginning of the conversation" on AI policy. He emphasized that effectiveness hinges on future Congresses adopting the recommendations. Despite discussions on endorsing bills for this Congress, the task force opted for bipartisanship over partisanship, refraining from introducing legislation. Tensions surfaced on certain aspects, highlighting the complexity of AI issues.

news.headline: Culver's new location in Princeton, Minnesota is now open at 200 19th Avenue North, offering ButterBurgers and Fresh Frozen Custard.
news.summary: A highly-anticipated event has finally come to fruition in Princeton, Minnesota as Culver's has recently opened its doors to the public. Situated at 200 19th Avenue North, the new establishment is poised to become a staple in the community, offering its renowned ButterBurgers and Fresh Frozen Custard. This development signals a significant achievement for the city and is certain to be warmly embraced by residents.

news.headline: FDA declares eggs meet new "healthy" definition, marking a milestone for health and nutrition. Dec.19, 2024 /PRNewswire.
news.summary: A recent announcement in Chicago on December 19, 2024 has shed new light on the nutritional value of eggs, declaring them a top pick for health-conscious individuals. This update from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration marks a significant milestone that is sure to captivate health enthusiasts and egg aficionados across the country.

news.headline: Sequel to "I Can Only Imagine" announced by Lionsgate, with production starting in spring, including cast members like Milo Ventimiglia.
news.summary: Actor Milo Ventimiglia has been confirmed to join the cast of the upcoming project "I Can," alongside returning cast members John Michael Finley, Trace Adkins, and Dennis Quaid. Lionsgate and Kingdom Story Company are gearing up for production on the highly anticipated project following the success of the holiday film "The Best Christmas Pageant Ever." Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting collaboration.

news.summary: Discover the latest top-performing stocks, such as Darden Restaurants, that have secured a place on the prestigious IBD lists for best growth stocks. Witness Darden stock surging by an impressive 15% to reach a record high. Explore the new additions in the IBD 50, IPO Leaders, and other lists for the best-performing stocks.
